title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Babita learns that Iyer and all her loved ones are busy on her birthday, she feels upset. Jethalal rushes to get a nice present for Babita.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal learns it is Babita's birthday and arrives at her house to wish her, but he accidentally leaks Iyer's surprise plans for her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal rushes to learn western dance forms when he learns about Babita's birthday party. Daya feels devastated when the ladies of Gokuldham inform her about the party's invitation card.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Babita's western birthday party approaches, the residents of Gokuldham Society begin preparing for the big day.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A dejected Jethalal plans to take his family to Lonavala when Babita does not invite him to her birthday party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya excitedly rush to get the perfect gift for Babita's birthday party. Babita and Iyer's grand party begins in full swing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya reach right on time for Babita's bash and learn that they failed to get the perfect gift for her. Champaklal attends the party and feels horrified to find Daya in a dress.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali tells Taarak that she gives him healthy food so that he can stay fit. Anjali puts Taarak on a diet after she learns that he has gained 4lbs.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal leaves early from the office to enjoy the delicious food prepared by Daya. Taarak tries to make Anjali give him tasty food by getting her a gift.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal eagerly awaits his mouth-watering dinner, but he feels bad when Daya tells him that Taarak has to diet.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal desperately tries to avoid having Taarak over for dinner. He eventually ends up faking a stomach ache and lands in more trouble than before.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Hathi suggests boiled food for Jethalal and tells Daya to be more careful with his diet for now. The Gadas meet up with famous dancers.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu wants a new season cricket bat. Later, he tries to come up with different and unique ways to convince his parents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu learns that Bhide is not allowing Sonu to go out and play. Later, an argument takes place between Jethalal and Bhide.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pyaarelal decides to change his name back to Popatlal and talks to Sapna's father. Sapna starts to feel close to him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sapna and Popatlal enjoy their time together and find themselves getting along well. Popatlal learns that he has another scheduled meeting with Kalpana.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal has a private conversation with Kalpana, but he finds himself in a predicament when both women agree to marry him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal puts himself in a difficult position after agreeing to both Kalpana and Sapna's marriage proposals.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal is pushed by Champaklal to make a final choice for his marriage, making him decide to turn to Tapu Sena for advice on his dilemma.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal meets both families again to come to a decision, but Sapna's family make him feel unexpectedly uncomfortable.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal lies to Sapna about having to attend to a work emergency, but his real intention is to visit Kalpana instead.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gopu Sena from 7 Star Society challenges Tapu Sena that their Ganesh Chaturthi event will win the award. Meanwhile, Bhide disagrees to provide funds to Tapu Sena for this event.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After a bank refuses a loan request, Tapu Sena approaches a moneylender to facilitate their event. Later, they have to pay a high price for it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena finally unveils the Ganpati decorations, and everyone is breathless by the setup. Meanwhile, They also have a second surprise to reveal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Rita is impressed and delighted by Tapu Sena's Ganesh Chaturthi event. She experiences the magic in this event and decides to promote it through her news channel.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All members of Gokuldham society pay their respects to Lord Ganesha. Later, everyone is excited to receive delightful gifts.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kids from the 7 Star Society are shocked to see the number of visitors in Gokuldham society. Meanwhile, the judges from the competition are impressed with the event and leave after giving positive feedback.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Ganesh Chaturthi event in Gokuldham becomes a crowd-puller, and everyone pitches in to handle the long queues of visitors.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham society wins the best Ganesh Chaturthi event award. Everyone is excited to hear the news, and Gopu Sena also praises Tapu Sena. Later, Tapu Sena has to pay the money to the moneylender who gives them a loan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena is shocked when they find the donated money collected at the Ganpati event is empty. They decide to catch the thief by checking the CCTV footage and soon find something suspicious.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena realises the folly of spending money that could use to help someone who is in need. Later, they apologise to everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone is happy with the success of Tapu Sena's Ganpati decorations. They are also pleased when Tapu Sena gives them each a memorable gift as a token of thanks.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide is upset and angry with everyone in society. Later, Madhavi asks him about the reason. He tells her that all members try to make fun of him for being the secretary.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All of the members go on a trip to visit Mumbai's famous Shree Siddhivinayak Ganapati Temple. Meanwhile, Bhide announces a surprise that he plans for everyone. He also apologises for the day before.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The members of the society return home to another surprise from Bhide. However, a new problem suddenly arises.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Panic arrives when Jethalal loses his house key, and everyone in the society helps him find the key. All of the members are tired, but they still cannot find the keys.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The members feel restless when Bhide is unable to find a key maker. Later, Taarak says that they should go and search for the bus.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The men of the Gokuldham Society set out to look for the key, but the rest of the members feel restless.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When the men return without the key, everyone is disappointed. They eventually find the key from somewhere unexpected.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to skip the second half of the exercise session. Sophia declares a 50,000 rupee fine for those who fail to continue the camp.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the men of Gokuldham Society feel the side effects of a good exercise session and yoga early in the day.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham's men plan a secret New Year's party at Popatlal's house, but Champaklal ends up drinking by mistake.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gadas invite some members of the society to join their trip to Kutch. Jethalal is upset about Goli joining them without his permission.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham residents travel to Kutch and all are excited about the journey. Jethalal tries his best to find a seat next to Babita.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham residents reach Kutch and Jethalal and Champaklal share various information about the region. All are happy with the beauty of Kutch and arrangements made for Kutch Rann Utsav.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everybody gets up early in the morning to watch the beautiful sunrise and take a ride in the hot-air balloon before visiting the BSF camp.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everybody takes part in the aarti of Godess Aashapura Mata in Kutch and buy souvenirs for other Gokuldham members.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sunder's assistant comes with the construction equipment but problem arises when Dr Hathi falls into mud. Jethalal and Daya decide to buy a plot in Kutch and meet an agent.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide makes frequent calls to Jethalal and disturbs him while he is discussing details of the plot with the agent. The residents of Gokuldham wear traditional clothes worn by the people of Kutch.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sundar's assistant starts maintenance work in the society. Bhide informs the residents about the new safety rules to be followed during the process.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and the others arrive in Kutch and go to a local hotel to have lunch. Iyer is not happy with the sweet food, but Jethalal takes up the challenge to ensure that he enjoys the food.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While enjoying the camel ride with his family and friends, Jethalal's camel takes a different direction and he goes missing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The police and BSF try to investigate and find Jethalal. Daya becomes restless as the situation gets worse. Jethalal crosses the border and reaches Pakistan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pakistani officers interrogate Jethalal. Daya and the rest get news of Jethalal being held captive in Pakistan. Taarak calls up Sodhi and comes to know about Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya and the family pray for Jethalal's return. The Pakistani authorities decide to put Jethalal in jail. Jethalal answers Bollywood-related queries from other inmates.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: With no update on Jethalal's status, the BSF officer suggests that everyone return home. However, everyone is infuriated with the idea and refuses to budge.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal tries to get out of trouble after agreeing to go on dates with Kalpana and Sapna at the same time.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kalpana shows her devotion with a tattoo dedicated to Popatlal. The police grow wary of Popatlal and decide to tail him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kalpana's father decides to meet Popatlal at his house. Sapna's family also agrees to meet him at the same time.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the residents of Gokuldham Society prepare for Popatlal and Kalpana's special ceremony. Kalpana and her family enter Popatlal's house.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As the ceremony takes place, a man arrives to meet Pyaarelal. The guests are stunned to learn about Pyaarelal's name change.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal invites everyone to his 'shagun' ceremony with Sapna. Later, Sapna gets a warm welcome to Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal gives Bhide a book. Meanwhile, Jethalal and the residents make preparations for Gudi Padwa in Gokuldham society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide and Madhavi explain to Sonu the importance of Gudi Padwa. Meanwhile, Jethalal and the other residents celebrate the festival.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham Society succeed in collecting a big fund. Later, they all decide to celebrate their success.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The 'Mahila Mandal' is excited about the lunch party. They get together and share some exciting and unforgettable incidents from their lives.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sundar's friend Jignesh arrives in Mumbai with a master plan to teach him a lesson. He approaches Daya with some jewellery sets.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The 'Mahila Mandal' decides to purchase jewellery from Sundar's friend Rakesh. The ladies are excited but hide the information from their husbands.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya realises that the necklace is fake and calls up Sundar. She discovers that a stranger has fooled them and shares the information with other ladies of the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The 'Mahila Mandal' comes up with a plan to find Rakesh and trap him. Without informing their husbands, they visit restaurants and try to find information about him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya arrives at the restaurant in a stunning attire and introduces herself as Mona Maheshwari. She doubts one of the waiters and tries to find some leads.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya's plan is perfectly executed and Rakesh arrives to make a deal. He is shocked to see the Mahila Mandal and is arrested by the police.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya reveals how the ladies came up with a plan and got the fake dealer arrested. The Gada family feels proud of Daya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya calls up Jethalal to tell him she will not be cooking anything. Everyone is curious about the trucks parked outside the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone wonders whose loaded trucks are parked in Gokuldham. Jethalal asks Popatlal to keep his figure for marriage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide and Jethalal try to wake up the man they find sleeping under one of the trucks, believing he is the driver.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After seeing Nattu Kaka's name on the truck, everyone suggests Jethalal calls him. However, Nattu Kaka thinks Jethalal calls because he misses him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya investigates the second truck and finds it filled with apples. Jethalal realises superstar Dharmendra is the one who sent the trucks to them as a gift.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Superstar Dharmendra greets the residents of Gokuldham and talks with them about the movies he has appeared in.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Chalu Pandey finds boxes of onions in Jethalal's shop, he thinks that Jethalal is selling them illegally and tries to arrest him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's family suffer multiple setbacks when Champaklal goes missing at the train station. A worried Daya seeks help from the media.

subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Reeling from aches and pains, the men blame each other for organising the fitness camp. Taarak blames Jethalal, who then blames Bhide for writing a fitness-inspired quote on the notice board.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women share stories about the aftermath of the fitness session. Jethalal suddenly hurts his back.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After the door of the society breaks, the members try to fix it using gum. Champaklal gets stuck to the door and the others try to save him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi breaks the society office's door while trying to open it. Babu Chipke brings a glue that can fix just about anything.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal moves to catch a ball and accidentally steps on a bit of glue. He reveals he is stuck and cannot move.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gokuldham Society members put their heads together to help free Champaklal. However, their plans fail, leaving Champaklal stressed about his situation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Champaklal finds himself glued to the door, the residents of Gokuldham take turns to try and help him out. Jethalal slams Popatlal for adding to Champaklal's problems.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Champaklal's health takes a turn for the worse, Dr Hathi is summoned to treat him. However, things take a surprising turn when Dr Hathi struggles to treat Champaklal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Champaklal finds himself stuck to the door, the residents of Gokuldham strive to save him. However, when all else fails, they decide to call the fire brigade.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is in for a surprise when Shetty visits his electronic store and is impressed with his salesmanship. Jethalal is thrilled as Shetty places a huge order with him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babu Chipke is annoyed when Jethalal keeps criticising his every move. He decides not to do any of the society's work, much to the other residents' dismay.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone is happy to learn that Iyer has found a solution to Bapuji's problem. However, they learn that he cannot get the solution from the laboratory.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal starts to feel tired as they wait for the solution to melt the glue. Iyer suggests that they can use lemon juice instead of the chemical solution.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Unable to get his tea, an upset Jethalal calls Bagha to fix his broken gas stove. Daya's hand gets injured.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Because Daya has injured her hand, Babita helps her prepare breakfast for everyone, which makes Jethalal happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tells Babita's friend she can pay for the phone later after noticing that she has forgotten her purse. However, he soon realises the woman is not Babita's friend.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is glad when Babita comes to their house and helps prepare breakfast after Daya accidentally injures her hand.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Nattu Kaka encounters a friend who informs him of a pay rise. He eventually urges Nattu Kaka to challenge Jethalal for higher wages.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After hearing Bhura talk about going on a strike against his boss for an increased salary, Bagha and Natu Kaka want to ask Jethalal for increased salaries as well.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Natu Kaka and Bagha demand through a written letter that Jethalal increase their salaries in 24 hours. Jethalal consults Taarak about the problem.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is tired of Natu Kaka and Bagha's messages and asks them for time to consider. However, Natu Kaka tells Jethalal they are going on a strike.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's friends advise him to convince Natu Kaka and Bagha to stop their strike. Things get worse when the strike is reported in the news.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Nattu Kaka and Bagha succeed in convincing Jethalal to raise their salaries, but they hear that Bhura's boss has fired him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Goddess Lakshmi comes to Jethalal in a dream and tells him to preserve his wealth. Popatlal asks Jethalal for notes of higher denominations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal wants to arrange a surprise party for members of the society. He asks Bhide for permission to use the club house and invites everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Popatlal is busy with the preparation, the ladies are curious about his surprise, but the men decide not to go to his party, making Popatlal upset.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Popatlal blackmails them, all men finally agree to go to the party. All the members of Gokuldham society gather at the party, and make guesses about Popatlal's surprise.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal admits that it is his son's 10th birthday and reveals to everyone in the society that his umbrella is the son he talked about before.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham society is fraught with chaos when Popatlal learns that someone stole his umbrella. All the members start searching for his umbrella.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After members of Gokuldham society cannot find Popatlal's umbrella, they call the police officers to help. Abdul later finds the umbrella but in a broken condition.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena calls everyone to gather in the clubhouse after deciding to find the mastermind behind the disappearance of Popatlal's umbrella.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya play a game of statues with each other. To help Daya win the game, Iyer tries to distract Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is annoyed with Iyer's behaviour during the game of statues. Later, he decides to teach Iyer a lesson.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Daya tells Madhavi about playing a game with Jethalal, it grabs everyone's attention and soon they are all hooked on it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Iyer tries to evade Jethalal, the latter does not give up and makes elaborate plans to avenge himself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The chaos makes Bhide angry and he demands an explanation from Iyer, not knowing that he is the innocent one.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Inspector Pandey suddenly arrives at the scene and asks Jethalal to come to the police station, it surprises everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After an argument with Natu Kaka, Jethalal gets furious. However, things cool down when Jethalal meets Babita.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal accidentally gives the 100 rupee note with Babita's relative's number written on it to an auto driver.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal makes up a story to cover up his mistake of losing the important phone number. Babita eagerly waits for Jethalal's phone call.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Baagha looks for the auto driver. Jethalal asks Natu Kaka to lie so that Babita feels better as she was constantly trying his number.

subTitle: Tapu manages to save Jethalal from his misery. Jethalal now has to face another difficult situation and take an injection.
